title: hypoporum lithospermum
intro: Hypoporum lithospermum, also known as Lithospermum, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the borage family and is commonly found in mountainous regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Hypoporum lithospermum include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and supporting the immune system. Hypoporum lithospermum is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and can also be used topically in creams and ointments to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
